serviceDescription: Pre-signature verification for autonomous agents. VETO exposes five MCP tools: veto_verdict (simulate a transaction and return ALLOW/WARN/VETO), veto_approvals (audit live allowances), veto_payload (screen inbound tasks), veto_counterparty (trust ruling on an address), and veto_forensics (replay a historical tx). Every ruling is evidence-hashed and attested on X Layer.
